debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨fun {W} h k hfg => ?_, fun {Z} h k hfg => ?_⟩
  · have := congr_arg (· ≫ hf.inv) hfg
    simp only [assoc, IsIso.comp_inv, id_comp] at this
    exact this
  · have := congr_arg (hf.inv ≫ ·) hfg
    simp only [assoc, IsIso.inv_comp, comp_id] at this
    exact this

refine' ⟨_, _⟩
  · intro W h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    simp_all [← comp_assoc]
  · intro Z h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← comp_assoc]

constructor
  · intro W h k hcomp
    have h1 := hf.inv_comp
    have h2 := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← assoc]
  · intro Z h k hcomp
    have h1 := hf.inv_comp
    have h2 := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← assoc]

constructor
  · intro W h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    have hf'' := hf.comp_inv
    calc
      h = h ≫ id X := by simp
      _ = h ≫ (f ≫ hf.inv) := by rw [hf']
      _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ hf.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ hf.inv := by rw [hcomp]
      _ = k ≫ (f ≫ hf.inv) := by rw [assoc]
      _ = k ≫ id X := by rw [hf']
      _ = k := by simp
  · intro Z h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    have hf'' := hf.comp_inv
    calc
      h = id Y ≫ h := by simp
      _ = (hf.inv ≫ f) ≫ h := by rw [hf'']
      _ = hf.inv ≫ (f ≫ h) := by rw [assoc]
      _ = hf.inv ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [hcomp]
      _ = (hf.inv ≫ f) ≫ k := by rw [assoc]
      _ = id Y ≫ k := by rw [hf'']
      _ = k := by simp

constructor
  · intro W h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    rw [← Category.id_comp h, ← hf', ← Category.assoc, hcomp, Category.assoc, hf.inv_comp, Category.id_comp]
  · intro Z h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.comp_inv
    rw [← Category.comp_id h, ← hf', ← Category.assoc, hcomp, Category.assoc, hf.comp_inv, Category.comp_id]

constructor
  · intro W h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    have hf'' := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← assoc]
  · intro Z h k hcomp
    have hf' := hf.inv_comp
    have hf'' := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← assoc]

refine' ⟨_, _⟩
  case refine'_1 =>
    intro W h k hcomp
    have h1 : h ≫ f ≫ hf.inv = k ≫ f ≫ hf.inv := by rw [hcomp]
    simpa [assoc, hf.inv_comp] using h1
  case refine'_2 =>
    intro Z h k hcomp
    have h1 : hf.inv ≫ f ≫ h = hf.inv ≫ f ≫ k := by rw [hcomp]
    simpa [assoc, hf.comp_inv] using h1

refine' ⟨fun W h k h1 => _, fun Z h k h1 => _⟩
  · have h2 := hf.inv_comp
    rw [← Category.comp_assoc, h1, Category.comp_assoc, h2, Category.id_comp]
  · have h2 := hf.comp_inv
    rw [← Category.comp_assoc, h1, Category.comp_assoc, h2, Category.comp_id]

refine' ⟨fun W h k h1 => _, fun Z h k h1 => _⟩
  · have := hf.inv_comp
    simp_all [← assoc]
  · have := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← assoc]

refine' ⟨fun W h k hfg => _, fun Z h k hfg => _⟩
  · have := hf.inv_comp
    simp_all [← comp_assoc]
  · have := hf.comp_inv
    simp_all [← comp_assoc]

constructor
  · intro W h k h_eq
    have h_inv := hf.inv
    calc
      h = h ≫ id X := by simp
      _ = h ≫ (f ≫ h_inv) := by rw [← hf.inv_comp]
      _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ h_inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ h_inv := by rw [h_eq]
      _ = k ≫ (f ≫ h_inv) := by rw [assoc]
      _ = k ≫ id X := by rw [hf.inv_comp]
      _ = k := by simp
  · intro Z h k h_eq
    have h_inv := hf.inv
    calc
      h = id Y ≫ h := by simp
      _ = (h_inv ≫ f) ≫ h := by rw [hf.comp_inv]
      _ = h_inv ≫ (f ≫ h) := by rw [assoc]
      _ = h_inv ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [h_eq]
      _ = (h_inv ≫ f) ≫ k := by rw [assoc]
      _ = id Y ≫ k := by rw [hf.comp_inv]
      _ = k := by simp
